debugRawResponseHelp: Writes the full last SEMS API response into info.rawResponse. Useful to discover fields this adapter does not map yet. Off by default.
hintLoginText: Log in with your normal SEMS Portal account (the same you use at semsportal.com or in the SEMS app). No SEMS "organization"/OpenAPI account is required.
hintPollingText: The SEMS Portal is not documented for third-party use and has been observed to rate-limit accounts that poll too aggressively. 5 minutes is a safe default; the adapter enforces a hard floor of 60s and automatically backs off after errors or a rate-limit response.
hintPushoverText: Critical events (login failures, SEMS rate-limiting, prolonged outages, unexpected adapter errors) can be pushed to your phone via Pushover, in addition to always being written to the ioBroker log.
maxConsecutiveErrorsHelp: Number of consecutive failed poll cycles before info.connection is considered a real outage and (if enabled) a Pushover alert is sent.
powerStationIdHelp: Leave empty to auto-detect the plant owned by this account. Multiple plants on one account: set the ID explicitly (found in the SEMS portal URL after login, e.g. semsportal.com/powerstation/powerstatussnmin/<ID>).
requestTimeoutHelp: Per HTTP request to the SEMS Portal.
semsAccountHelp: The e-mail address you use to log in at semsportal.com.
stationOfflineMinutesHelp: Informational only - shown in the outage notification text.
